title: Cookies, Credential Modes, API Keys, Bearer Tokens, and Secret Hygiene · Go Client Systems · Contract Triage
summary: An on-call reliability engineer tracing a production client incident must isolate a plausible but incorrect result from conflicting traces, repair its cause, and retain a regression witness for cookies, credential modes, api keys, bearer tokens, and secret hygiene, producing least-authority credential and session policy. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a Go 1.26 net/http least-authority credential and session policy and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression re…
objectives: Apply cookie domain, host-only, path, expiry, Secure, HttpOnly, and SameSite scope through a deliberate jar policy. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Recognize ambient cookie authority and require CSRF defenses for state-changing browser requests. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Place API keys in approved headers or signing inputs and exclude them from URLs, source, telemetry, and error text. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Cookie Jar Scope
steps.instruction:
debug case — Go incident collection agent handles host-only session cookie SID-5, SameSite policy, API key, and expiring bearer token while two accounts run concurrently. Define jar isolation, CSRF, scope, rotation, redaction, and redirect boundaries. Competency probe: Apply cookie domain, host-only, path, expiry, Secure, HttpOnly, and SameSite scope through a deliberate jar policy. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Inspect the Cookie Jar Scope trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

For Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Cookie Jar Scope, keep Cookie Jar Scope connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
